title: turnera ulmifolia var. angustifolia
intro: Turnera ulmifolia var. angustifolia, commonly known as the West Indian sarsaparilla or narrow-leaved turnera, is a plant species in the family Passifloraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Turnera ulmifolia var. angustifolia include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems.
